pages.text: The $(item)Pale Garden Skyseed$() — pale-oak logs and a pale moss block, both off a $(bold)Forest island thrown over a pale garden$(). The eerie cousin of the Forest seed.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A hush of pale oak and creeping moss, lit only by eyeblossoms that open after dark. $(bold)Creaking hearts$() in the trees wake a Creaking at night — keep watching it. Hanging moss drips from the underside; coal and iron sit in the core.
